about.title: About
sections: I focus on solving real-world problems using data and engineering concepts.
My work combines analytical thinking with practical implementation.
I continuously learn, build, and improve through hands-on projects.

experience.title: Intern – Design Thinking with AI
experience.description:
Applied design thinking to solve real-world problems.

• Built solution prototypes using AI-powered tools
• Worked with low-code/no-code platforms
• Focused on structured problem solving

projects.title: Smart IoT Home Monitoring System
projects.longDescription:
Designed and developed a system to track temperature and humidity using IoT sensors.

• Real-time data collection
• Dashboard-based visualization
• Improved monitoring efficiency

projects.title: Real-Time Intrusion Detection System
projects.longDescription:
Built a system to detect suspicious network activity using machine learning.

• Real-time packet analysis
• ML-based classification
• Interactive monitoring dashboard

projects.title: Smartphone Market Data Analysis
projects.longDescription:
Analyzed smartphone datasets to identify pricing trends and patterns.

• Data cleaning and preprocessing
• Visualization using Plotly
• Regression-based insights
